message:
feat: Implement dual-mode rendering system (human + robot)

src/render/mod.rs - Render Module Interface (~1.4KB):
- OutputFormat enum: Human, Json, Markdown
- render_usage(): Dispatch to format-specific renderer
- render_cost(): Cost output with format selection
- Format detection from CLI args

src/render/human.rs - Human-Readable Output (~23KB):

Rich terminal formatting using rich_rust library:
- Styled panels with colored borders per provider
- Progress bars with percentage visualization
- Color-coded status indicators

Panel structure:
```
╭─ Codex (openai-web) ──────────────────────────────────╮
│ Session  72% left   [========----]  resets in 2h 15m  │
│ Weekly   41% left   [====--------]  resets Fri 9am    │
│ Credits  112.4 left                                   │
│ Account  user@example.com                             │
│ Status   Operational                                  │
╰───────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

Key functions:
- render_usage(): Format UsageSnapshot for terminal
- render_cost(): Format CostPayload with daily breakdown
- render_provider_panel(): Create styled panel per provider
- format_progress_bar(): ASCII progress bar [====----]
- percentage_color(): Color threshold logic
  - Green: >= 25% remaining
  - Yellow: >= 10% remaining
  - Red: < 10% remaining

Features:
- TTY detection for automatic color disable
- Unicode box drawing for panels
- Bold/dim/color text attributes
- Compact mode for narrow terminals
- Status indicator integration

src/render/robot.rs - Machine-Readable Output (~22KB):

JSON output (caut.v1 schema):
```json
{
  "schemaVersion": "caut.v1",
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-18T12:00:00Z",
  "command": "usage",
  "providers": [...],
  "errors": [],
  "meta": { "format": "json", "flags": [] }
}
```

Markdown output (token-efficient):
```markdown
## Codex (openai-web)
- session_left: 72%
- weekly_left: 41%
- resets_session: 2026-01-18T14:15:00Z
- credits_left: 112.4
```

Key functions:
- render_json(): Compact JSON serialization
- render_json_pretty(): Indented JSON for readability
- render_usage_json(): Build RobotOutput envelope
- render_cost_json(): Cost data with schema wrapper
- render_markdown_usage(): Markdown table format
- render_markdown_cost(): Cost summary in markdown

Field naming:
- camelCase for JSON compatibility
- Matches caut.v1 schema specification
- Optional fields omitted when None

src/render/doctor.rs - Diagnostics Output (~16KB):

Health check result formatting:
- Pass/Warn/Fail status per check
- Actionable suggestions for failures
- Timing information for performance insight

Output format:
```
Provider: Claude
├─ ✓ CLI installed (0.2ms)
├─ ✓ Authenticated as user@example.com (1.5ms)
└─ ✓ API reachable (45ms)

Provider: Codex
├─ ✗ CLI not found
│   Suggestion: Install via: npm install -g @openai/codex
└─ ⚠ Auth file outdated (> 30 days old)
```

Design principles:
- Separation of data and presentation
- Format-agnostic ProviderPayload input
- Consistent output regardless of data source
- Schema versioning for API stability
- Human output prioritizes readability
- Robot output prioritizes parseability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
